name: terraform-best-practices
description: MCP server for Terraform best-practice guidance, linting, security scanning, and cost insights
author: Carl Dawson

tools.name: run_tflint
tools.description: Run tflint against a Terraform project directory

tools.name: run_checkov
tools.description: Run checkov over a Terraform directory

tools.name: run_trivy
tools.description: Run trivy config scanning against Terraform code

tools.name: run_kics
tools.description: Run kics IaC scanning against Terraform code

tools.name: run_infracost
tools.description: Run infracost breakdown for a Terraform directory

tools.name: fetch_terraform_best_practices
tools.description: Fetch Terraform best-practice guidance from terraform-best-practices.com

tools.name: fetch_provider_best_practices
tools.description: Fetch Terraform best practices for Azure, AWS, or GCP

tools.name: fetch_terraform_registry_guidance
tools.description: Fetch Terraform Registry guidance for providers, resources, and modules

tools.name: analyze_terraform_code
tools.description: Analyze Terraform code structure, modularity, variables, and best practices

tools.name: generate_cost_report
tools.description: Generate a comprehensive cost report from infracost output with optimization suggestions

tools.name: suggest_security_hardening
tools.description: Analyze security scan output and suggest hardening steps to improve infrastructure security

tools.name: generate_compliance_summary
tools.description: Generate a compliance summary report from multiple security scan outputs
